Cattail_Tweaks_简体中文优化.name: Optimized Simplified Chinese Locale
Cattail_Tweaks_简体中文优化.description: Adds the 中文优化版 language extracted from the previous modified words.js.

Cattail_Tweaks_Chat-Timestamps.name: Chat Timestamps
Cattail_Tweaks_Chat-Timestamps.description: Adds timestamps to chat bubbles and persists them in saves.

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Better-UIs.name: Better UIs
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Better-UIs.description: Combines shop categories, save slots, and the language menu into one multi-entry interface quality mod.

enableShopCategories.label: Shop categories
enableShopCategories.description: Show the optional categorized compact building shop view.

enableSaveSlots.label: Save slots
enableSaveSlots.description: Show the in-game save-slot page with import and export actions.

enableLanguageMenu.label: Language menu
enableLanguageMenu.description: Use the scrollable language selection page on the splash menu.

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Custom-Background-.name: Custom Background Color
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Custom-Background-.description: Cleans reality-plane machine sprites so their baked white matte becomes transparent and their baked floor shadows render as neutral alpha shadows.

globalThresholds.label: Global cleanup thresholds
globalThresholds.description: Global cleanup multipliers. matte/shadow/edge are 0-3. Lower preserves more sprite detail; higher removes more matte, shadow, or edge fringe.

spriteThresholds.label: Sprite cleanup thresholds
spriteThresholds.description: Per-image cleanup keyed by img/*.png. Supports matte/shadow/edge, enabled:false, matteDistance, matteLuma, matteSaturation, matteSeeds:[[x,y]], and one-based frames:{"5":{...}} overrides.

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Dynamic-Details.name: Dynamic Details
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Dynamic-Details.description: Adds Alt+Shift dynamic building detail panels and shop build-availability countdowns without modifying vanilla scripts.

cookieDirectionPassword.label: Cookie direction password
cookieDirectionPassword.description: Enter cookie to show the cookie direction indicator before Cookie Clicker is achieved.

resourceSourceLineRenderer.label: Resource source line renderer
resourceSourceLineRenderer.description: Choose how resource source lines are rendered. Press O in game to switch this value.

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Resource-Watcher.name: Resource Watcher
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Resource-Watcher.description: Adds a bottom-right resource watcher button that shrinks the game into an always-on-top resource monitor without changing vanilla scripts. Integrates with Dynamic Details resource-source data when that mod is enabled.

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Tweaks.name: Tweaks
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Tweaks.description: Combines view distance limits, ending skip, accessibility buttons, stabilizer surge flash reduction, void return fade skip, resource glow colors, chasm line rendering, floor grid outlines, play-time counter, and explainer fixes into one multi-entry quality mod.

enableEndingSkip.label: Ending skip
enableEndingSkip.description: Show a skip button during the pinhole ending and credits sequence.

enableAccessibilityButtons.label: Accessibility buttons
enableAccessibilityButtons.description: Show the bottom accessibility control bar and reality-floor color palette.

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: Stabilizer surge flash reduction
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: After the void altar exists, hide full-screen flashes caused by stabilizer-triggered surge effects.

enableResourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow colors
enableResourceGlowColors.description: Color resource icon glows by resource, with optional per-resource overrides.

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: Play time counter
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: Show the active run play-time counter on the game canvas.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Play time counter position
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

resourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow palette
resourceGlowColors.description: Per-resource glow color overrides. Empty rows use each resource's native color.

farthestZoom.label: Farthest zoom
farthestZoom.description: Lower values show more of the world. Vanilla far limit is 0.3.

closestZoom.label: Closest zoom
closestZoom.description: Higher values zoom closer to the world. Vanilla near limit is 2.

fallbackZoom.label: Fallback zoom
fallbackZoom.description: Used when the saved zoom value is missing or invalid.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Chasm line renderer
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Allow this mod to replace the chasm-to-resource lines with the selected renderer.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Chasm line rendering mode
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D uses the original game drawing. WebGL renders the same chasm-to-resource curves through a GPU-backed canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Chasm lines ignore distance
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Keep rendering chasm-to-resource lines even when the chasm is outside the normal visible range.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Floor grid outlines
enableFloorGridLines.description: Draw thin outlines around the in-game floor cells.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Reality floor grid outline color
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Leave empty to use the default dark gray outline in reality.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Void floor grid outline color
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Leave empty to use the default white outline in the void.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Skip void return fade
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: When returning from the void to reality, remove the long white recovery fade and show the clear view immediately.

enableExplainerFix.label: Explainer fix
enableExplainerFix.description: Refresh pulsing explainer hints after language changes and use readable light text in the void.

Cattail_TweaksX_Reality-Pack.name: Reality Pack
Cattail_TweaksX_Reality-Pack.description: Combines Auto Reality Collect, Scan Reality Surges, and Super Silo into one TweaksX mod.

surgeCount.label: Surge count
surgeCount.description: Number of random surges to create when a supercritical kernel lands.

surgeRadius.label: Spawn radius
surgeRadius.description: Circular radius, in cells, used to search for empty reality-plane spawn spots.

fillAmount.label: Long fill amount
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality auto collect
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automatically collect ready Reality / soul power in the void world.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Scan reality surges
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Create random reality-plane surges when a supercritical kernel lands.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Keep activated silos filled with the configured long fill amount.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Supercritical kernel slider
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Show the supercritical kernel range and Reality infusion slider on its shop card.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Hollow vent Reality source
enableHollowVentReality.description: Let hollow vents grow Reality symbols that are automatically harvested through the void altar.

ventRealityInterval.label: Vent production time
ventRealityInterval.description: Seconds each hollow vent takes to grow a Reality symbol.

ventRealityAmount.label: Small vent Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality gained from each small hollow vent symbol.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Large vent multiplier
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the large hollow vent Reality output.

Cattail_Tweaks_Chat-Timestamps.name: 聊天时间戳
Cattail_Tweaks_Chat-Timestamps.description: 给聊天气泡添加时间戳，并将时间戳保存到存档。

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Better-UIs.name: 更好的UI界面
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Better-UIs.description: 将商店分类、存档栏和语言菜单整合为一个界面优化 mod。

enableShopCategories.label: 商店分类
enableShopCategories.description: 可将建筑建造卡的视图切换至可按照分类进行收缩/展开。

enableSaveSlots.label: 存档栏
enableSaveSlots.description: 新增游戏内存档页，并提供导入和导出功能。

enableLanguageMenu.label: 语言菜单
enableLanguageMenu.description: 语言切换功能新增滚动列表。

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Custom-Background-.name: 自定义背景颜色
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Custom-Background-.description: 清理现实世界机器贴图，让烘焙的白色底色变透明，并将烘焙地面阴影渲染为中性透明阴影。

globalThresholds.label: 全局清理阈值
globalThresholds.description: 全局清理倍率。matte/shadow/edge 范围为 0-3。数值越低保留越多贴图细节，越高会移除更多底色、阴影或边缘杂色。

spriteThresholds.label: 贴图清理阈值
spriteThresholds.description: 按 img/*.png 设置单张图片清理参数。支持 matte/shadow/edge、enabled:false、matteDistance、matteLuma、matteSaturation、matteSeeds:[[x,y]]，以及从 1 开始的 frames:{"5":{...}} 帧覆盖。

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Dynamic-Details.name: 动态详情
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Dynamic-Details.description: 添加 Alt+Shift 动态建筑详情面板和商店建造可用倒计时，不修改原版脚本。

cookieDirectionPassword.label: 饼干方向密码
cookieDirectionPassword.description: 输入 cookie 可在达成 Cookie Clicker 前显示饼干方向指示。

resourceSourceLineRenderer.label: 资源来源连线渲染
resourceSourceLineRenderer.description: 选择资源来源连线的渲染方式。游戏中按 O 也会切换这个值。

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Resource-Watcher.name: 资源监视器
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Resource-Watcher.description: 添加右下角资源监视按钮，可将游戏缩小成置顶资源监视窗口，不修改原版脚本。启用 Dynamic Details 时会联动资源来源数据。

Cattail_TweaksQuality_Tweaks.name: 优化和修复
Cattail_TweaksQuality_Tweaks.description: 优化和修复游戏中的部分内容。

enableEndingSkip.label: 结局跳过
enableEndingSkip.description: 新增在结局和致谢名单的跳过功能。

enableAccessibilityButtons.label: 游戏内设置按钮
enableAccessibilityButtons.description: 鼠标移动到底部中间时会弹出设置按钮。

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: 禁用稳定器触发浪涌时的闪烁
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: 在建造虚空祭坛之后，也禁用稳定器激活浪涌效果时产生的全频闪烁。

enableResourceGlowColors.label: 资源发光颜色
enableResourceGlowColors.description: 新增默认根据资源的颜色改变对应资源发光颜色，并支持自定义。

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: 游戏时长显示
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: 在游戏里显示当前存档的游玩时长。

playTimeCounterPosition.label: 游戏时长位置
playTimeCounterPosition.description: 滑动选择右下角、顶部居中或左下角。

resourceGlowColors.label: 资源发光颜色自定义
resourceGlowColors.description: 可自定义设置每种资源的发光颜色。

enableViewDistance.label: 禁用视野距离限制
enableViewDistance.description: 可修改原版游戏的视角的远近限制。

farthestZoom.label: 最远视角距离
farthestZoom.description: 数值越低，可看到的世界范围越大。原版最远限制为 0.3。

closestZoom.label: 最近视角距离
closestZoom.description: 数值越高，镜头可以拉得越近。原版最近限制为 2。

fallbackZoom.label: 默认缩放
fallbackZoom.description: 当保存的缩放值缺失或无效时使用。

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: 逆裂缝绘线渲染模式切换
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: 新增并可切换WebGL逆裂缝绘线的渲染方式，以提升性能。

chasmLineRendererMode.label: 渲染模式
chasmLineRendererMode.description: 原版渲染方式为Canvas 2D。可切换至WebGL渲染模式，用GPU进行渲染以提升性能。

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: 无视距离渲染逆裂缝绘线
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: 无论距离多远，逆裂缝的绘线都会保持渲染。

enableFloorGridLines.label: 地板方格边框显示
enableFloorGridLines.description: 新增地板方格边框，方便数格子。

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: 现实维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: 留空时现实世界使用默认深灰色边框。

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: 虚空维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: 留空时虚空世界使用默认白色边框。

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: 禁用回到现实白屏淡出效果
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: 从虚空维度返回现实维度时，移除长时间的白色淡出效果，直接显示清晰画面。

enableExplainerFix.label: 提示句修复
enableExplainerFix.description: 修复提示语在切换语言后不刷新，并让虚空世界里的提示文字变成亮色以便看清。

Cattail_TweaksX_Reality-Pack.name: 机制修改
Cattail_TweaksX_Reality-Pack.description: 修改游戏的机制，可能会影响游戏平衡

surgeCount.label: 浪涌数量
surgeCount.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌生成范围内的浪涌数量。

surgeRadius.label: 浪涌生成半径
surgeRadius.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌的生成范围。

fillAmount.label: 筒仓填充值
fillAmount.description: 可修改超级筒仓的填充值

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: 现实自动收集
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 自动收集在虚空维度中完全发亮的符号。

enableScanRealitySurges.label: 强力超临界内核
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 超临界内核得到加强。在震荡现实结构时，会在现实对应位置震出一些浪涌。

enableSuperSilo.label: 超级筒仓
enableSuperSilo.description: 让已激活的筒仓保持配置的超长填充值。

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 可控超临界内核
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 可以注入现实来提升超临界内核的威力。

enableHollowVentReality.label: 虚空维度裂缝现实渗入
enableHollowVentReality.description: 空心石在虚空维度的穿孔裂缝会持续渗入现实。

ventRealityInterval.label: 现实渗入时间
ventRealityInterval.description: 每个现实渗入所需的秒数。

ventRealityAmount.label: 现实渗入数量
ventRealityAmount.description: 每个空心石渗入的现实的数量。

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 大空心石现实渗入倍率
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 大空心石渗入的现实的数量倍率。
